grid._comment: Single source of truth for the model grid. target_res_m is THE model resolution (16 km); it replaces the old two-stage 4 km + AGG_FACTOR=4 downsample. Every product is aggregated to this resolution from its own native resolution via linear block aggregation, and nonlinear steps (Ruzicka kernel/PCA for Z, BUI quantiles, transforms) are applied at this resolution -- so Z is built at 16 km, never pooled. ref_raster defines the CRS/transform/extent (the base 4 km grid); the model grid is that grid block-aggregated to target_res_m. Per-product block factors are derived at runtime from each source raster's native resolution (see src/processing/regrid.py).

luh3._comment: LUH-3 v1.2 CMIP7 Historical (850-2024, 0.25deg). states + management only; transitions (17GB, flows not states) skipped.

hyde._comment: HYDE 3.5 baseline netCDF (5 arc-min global, one file per variable spanning all time points). Confirmed accessible over plain HTTP at geo.public.data.uu.nl (not the bot-protected public.yoda.uu.nl). Add urban_area.nc etc. to files if needed.

sciencebase._comment: USGS BBS releases via ScienceBase item file API. bbs = newest US/Canada release (2026 Release, 1966-2025). bbs_mexico = 2008-2018 UNPROCESSED (DOI 10.5066/P9L4KBDC); lacks RunType/RPID, incorporated with a quality covariate.
